source: UMADA_CANON_INDEX.md, delivered by Kemi 2026-06-25; corroborated independently by the Book One canon package's book/timeline.md ("The Five Houses convene" at the Council Era).
rule: Exactly five Houses unless explicitly revised.
relationship_to_era_15_faction_list: Layered on top of, not in place of, the pre-existing EMERGING six-name faction list (data/factions.json, 01_canon/CIVILIZATIONAL_LEDGER.md Era 15). Partial name correspondence is plausible but not asserted as fact — see 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md #33 and #34.

houses.name: Lion House
houses.faction_layer_cross_reference: Plausibly corresponds to 'Lion Kingdom' in data/factions.json — not confirmed.

houses.name: Jaguar House
houses.faction_layer_cross_reference: No clear predecessor in data/factions.json. Near-homophone of 'Jackal Peoples' — explicitly NOT treated as the same entity. See Open Question #34.

houses.name: Cybernetic House
houses.faction_layer_cross_reference: Plausibly corresponds to 'Cybernetic Houses' in data/factions.json — not confirmed.

houses.name: Pure Human House
houses.faction_layer_cross_reference: Plausibly corresponds to 'Pure Human Communities' in data/factions.json — not confirmed.

houses.name: S-Vector House
houses.faction_layer_cross_reference: No predecessor in data/factions.json. Substantially clarifies, but is not stated outright to be, the previously-undefined Era 2 — S-Vector. See Open Question #35.
